name: feature-loader-c6-spike-4
description: Phase 1 spike — sample 4 of 5. Same procedure; accumulates sample 4.

commands: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetC6CacheReport(); const atlas = r && r.labels && r.labels['penumbra-render-atlas']; if (!atlas || atlas.samples < 4) throw new Error('atlas samples=' + (atlas && atlas.samples) + ' (expected >=4)'); console.log('[c6-spike-4] sample 4: cold=' + atlas.coldMs + 'ms warmAvg=' + atlas.warmAvgMs + 'ms samples=' + atlas.samples); return 'sample 4 ok'; })()
